name: GeoAgent
subtitle: Undergraduate Thesis
description: Multi-agent AI system for fragmented disaster data. Offline 5-agent RAG pipeline (routing, SQL, semantic, visualization, synthesis) over 23,687 chunks and a geospatial DB. Applied to the 2025 Bogo City Earthquake. Evaluated vs single-agent baseline on 40 queries via RAGAS — multi-agent answered all, baseline refused most. Adapted from Hu et al. 2025 maritime framework.

name: Sir Chan's TLE Tambayan
subtitle: Full-Stack LMS
description: Specialized Learning Management System with RBAC separating teacher and student dashboards. Cookie-based Supabase SSR sessions, real-time DB sync, Supabase Storage for curriculum delivery, and SEO-optimized server-side rendering. Built as a contract project (Aug 2025 – Apr 2026).

name: Pagsusi
subtitle: ML Research
description: Electoral integrity analysis of the 2025 Philippine Senate Elections. Detects and scores voting anomalies across precincts nationwide using unsupervised ML. Classifies flagged precincts by severity: Critical, High, Medium, Low.
